subcodes.first_line: O thou who art detached, according to what hath been heard thou hast entered the ranks of the destitute and joined the company of the impoverished [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پاکباز از قرار مسموع در جرگه مفلسان داخل شدید و در زمره بینوایان وارد جمعت
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
